title: hedeoma oblongifolia var. mexicana
intro: Hedeoma oblongifolia var. mexicana, also known as Mexican pennyroyal, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family. The plant is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, and it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mexican pennyroyal include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Mexican pennyroyal can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
